zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Gant於1048年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特時，他的父親Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln53歲，母親Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg40歲。他於1065年之前與Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1095年在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年47歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾巴德尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Gant于1048年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特时，他的父亲Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln53岁，母亲Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg40岁。他于1065年之前与Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1095年在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年47岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾巴德尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ghent in Flanders, Belgium.
English: from Middle English gaunt, gant ‘slim, slender; drawn, thin and angular’.
North German: probably a variant of   Gans   ‘goose’.

variants.name: Gans
meanings: from gans ‘goose’, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who bred or tended geese, or a nickname for someone who wobbled or behaved (foolishly) like a goose, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a goose.
nickname for a healthy or strong person, from Middle Low German gans ‘whole, complete, healthy’.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Gant was born in 1048, in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, was 53 and his mother, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, was 40. He married Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle before 1065, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1095, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Bardney, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Gant est né en 1048, à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle avant 1065, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1095, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Bardney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Gant 1048 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln 53 und seine Mutter Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg 40. Er hat vor 1065 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1095 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Bardney, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Gant è nato il nel 1048 nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle prima del 1065, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1095, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Bardney, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gantが1048年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた時，父Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincolnは53歳，母Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourgは40歳であった。1065年以前にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムでAlix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1095年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムで47歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアバードニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Gant(이)가 1048년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1065년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1095년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 바드니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Gant nasceu em 1048, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle antes 1065, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1095, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Gant родился в 1048 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle перед 1065 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1095 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности бардни, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert de Gant nació en 1048, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle antes de 1065, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1095, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
